import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import math
import torch.nn.functional as F


class DKT(nn.Module):
    """LSTM-based Deep Knowledge Tracing with learned embeddings"""
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=128, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.3):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        # Learned interaction embeddings: 2*num_skills (skill + correct/wrong)
        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=2 * num_skills)
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            input_size=embed_dim,
            hidden_size=hidden_dim,
            num_layers=num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        # interaction_ids: skill + correct*num_skills
        interaction_ids = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills  # [B, T]
        x = self.interaction_embed(interaction_ids)  # [B, T, embed_dim]
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(
            x, lengths.cpu(), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False
        )
        out, _ = self.lstm(packed)
        out, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(out, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        out = self.dropout(out)
        logits = self.fc(out)  # [B, T, num_skills]
        return logits


class DKTOneHot(nn.Module):
    """Original DKT with one-hot input (2*num_skills)"""
    def __init__(self, num_skills, hidden_dim=200, num_layers=1, dropout=0.5):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        input_dim = 2 * num_skills
        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(
            input_size=input_dim,
            hidden_size=hidden_dim,
            num_layers=num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=dropout if num_layers > 1 else 0.0
        )
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        # One-hot encoding: skill_id + correct*num_skills
        interaction_ids = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills  # [B, T]
        x = F.one_hot(interaction_ids, num_classes=2 * self.num_skills).float()  # [B, T, 2*num_skills]
        packed = nn.utils.rnn.pack_padded_sequence(
            x, lengths.cpu(), batch_first=True, enforce_sorted=False
        )
        out, _ = self.lstm(packed)
        out, _ = nn.utils.rnn.pad_packed_sequence(out, batch_first=True, total_length=T)
        out = self.dropout(out)
        logits = self.fc(out)  # [B, T, num_skills]
        return logits


class DKVMN(nn.Module):
    """
    Dynamic Key-Value Memory Network for Knowledge Tracing.
    Uses external memory to track knowledge state.
    """
    def __init__(self, num_skills, key_dim=50, value_dim=200, memory_size=20, 
                 embed_dim=50, dropout=0.2):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.memory_size = memory_size
        self.key_dim = key_dim
        self.value_dim = value_dim
        
        # Key memory (static)
        self.key_memory = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(memory_size, key_dim))
        
        # Embeddings
        self.skill_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills + 1, key_dim, padding_idx=num_skills)
        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=2 * num_skills)
        
        # Erase and add networks
        self.erase_net = nn.Linear(embed_dim, value_dim)
        self.add_net = nn.Linear(embed_dim, value_dim)
        
        # Read network
        self.read_fc = nn.Linear(value_dim, 50)
        self.skill_fc = nn.Linear(key_dim, 50)
        self.output_fc = nn.Linear(100, 1)
        
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.tanh = nn.Tanh()
        self.sigmoid = nn.Sigmoid()
        
        # Initialize value memory
        self.init_value_memory = nn.Parameter(torch.randn(memory_size, value_dim) * 0.1)
    
    def attention(self, skill_embed):
        """Compute attention weights over memory slots"""
        # skill_embed: [B, key_dim]
        # key_memory: [M, key_dim]
        scores = torch.matmul(skill_embed, self.key_memory.t())  # [B, M]
        weights = torch.softmax(scores, dim=-1)  # [B, M]
        return weights
    
    def read(self, weights, value_memory):
        """Read from value memory"""
        # weights: [B, M], value_memory: [B, M, value_dim]
        r = torch.bmm(weights.unsqueeze(1), value_memory).squeeze(1)  # [B, value_dim]
        return r
    
    def write(self, weights, value_memory, interaction_embed):
        """Write to value memory"""
        # weights: [B, M], value_memory: [B, M, value_dim]
        erase = self.sigmoid(self.erase_net(interaction_embed))  # [B, value_dim]
        add = self.tanh(self.add_net(interaction_embed))  # [B, value_dim]
        
        # Erase
        erase_expand = torch.bmm(weights.unsqueeze(2), erase.unsqueeze(1))  # [B, M, value_dim]
        value_memory = value_memory * (1 - erase_expand)
        
        # Add
        add_expand = torch.bmm(weights.unsqueeze(2), add.unsqueeze(1))  # [B, M, value_dim]
        value_memory = value_memory + add_expand
        
        return value_memory
    
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        
        # Initialize value memory for each batch
        value_memory = self.init_value_memory.unsqueeze(0).expand(B, -1, -1).clone()  # [B, M, value_dim]
        
        # Interaction embeddings
        interaction_ids = skill_ids + corrects * self.num_skills  # [B, T]
        interaction_embeds = self.interaction_embed(interaction_ids)  # [B, T, embed_dim]
        skill_embeds = self.skill_embed(skill_ids)  # [B, T, key_dim]
        
        all_logits = []
        
        for t in range(T):
            # Attention weights for current skill
            w = self.attention(skill_embeds[:, t, :])  # [B, M]
            
            # Read from memory (knowledge state)
            r = self.read(w, value_memory)  # [B, value_dim]
            r = self.dropout(r)
            
            # Predict correctness for current skill
            r_feat = self.tanh(self.read_fc(r))  # [B, 50]
            s_feat = self.tanh(self.skill_fc(skill_embeds[:, t, :]))  # [B, 50]
            combined = torch.cat([r_feat, s_feat], dim=-1)  # [B, 100]
            logit = self.output_fc(combined).squeeze(-1)  # [B]
            all_logits.append(logit)
            
            # Write to memory with current interaction
            value_memory = self.write(w, value_memory, interaction_embeds[:, t, :])  # [B, M, value_dim]
        
        logits = torch.stack(all_logits, dim=1)  # [B, T]
        return logits


class TransformerKT(nn.Module):
    """
    Transformer-based Knowledge Tracing.
    Uses causal (autoregressive) attention.
    """
    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, num_heads=8, num_layers=4, 
                 dropout=0.2, max_seq_len=512, ff_dim=None):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = num_skills
        self.embed_dim = embed_dim
        if ff_dim is None:
            ff_dim = embed_dim * 4
        
        self.interaction_embed = nn.Embedding(2 * num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=2 * num_skills)
        self.skill_embed = nn.Embedding(num_skills + 1, embed_dim, padding_idx=num_skills)
        self.pos_embed = nn.Embedding(max_seq_len + 2, embed_dim)
        
        encoder_layer = nn.TransformerEncoderLayer(
            d_model=embed_dim,
            nhead=num_heads,
            dim_feedforward=ff_dim,
            dropout=dropout,
            batch_first=True,
            norm_first=True
        )
        self.transformer = nn.TransformerEncoder(encoder_layer, num_layers=num_layers)
        
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(embed_dim)
        self.fc = nn.Linear(embed_dim * 2, 1)
        
    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects, lengths):
        B, T = skill_ids.shape
        device = skill_ids.device
        
        interaction_ids = skill_ids[:, :-1] + corrects[:, :-1] * self.num_skills
        positions = torch.arange(T-1, device=device).unsqueeze(0)
        
        x = self.interaction_embed(interaction_ids)
        x = x + self.pos_embed(positions)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        
        T1 = T - 1
        causal_mask = torch.triu(torch.ones(T1, T1, device=device), diagonal=1).bool()
        key_padding_mask = torch.arange(T1, device=device).unsqueeze(0) >= (lengths.unsqueeze(1) - 1)
        
        out = self.transformer(x, mask=causal_mask, src_key_padding_mask=key_padding_mask)
        out = self.norm(out)
        
        next_skill_embed = self.skill_embed(skill_ids[:, 1:])
        combined = torch.cat([out, next_skill_embed], dim=-1)
        logits = self.fc(combined).squeeze(-1)  # [B, T-1]
        return logits
